response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C++ and geospatial data systems, but her primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang rather than modern C++ or Rust. Her geospatial work (GISCollective) is promising but lacks depth in routing-specific data pipelines. While she demonstrates problem-solving and system design skills, her experience with distributed systems and high-availability routing data is not clearly evident.
strengths: Strong geospatial data processing experience (GISCollective platform)
Proven ability to work across full technical stacks and optimize systems (e.g., low-latency apps at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated expertise in system reliability and testing practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited direct experience with modern C++ or Rust (primary requirement for the role)
No clear evidence of working with navigation/routing systems or routing data pipelines
Most recent work focuses on web/AI-agent infrastructure rather than geospatial routing systems
